  "stats": "Speed: 20cm\nTurn: 90°\nShield: 1\nArmour: 5+\nTurret: 1\nBase: 32mm\n\n• You may not have more Orcas than the gravitic hook capacity of the fleet. Each Orca\ncosts 25 points as much of their cost is included in the value of the parent ship.\n• Orcas are transported to battle on gravitic hooks. However, this has no effect in game\nterms – Orcas do not start a game attached to their parent ship, and can never be\ndocked during a game. Likewise, the number of gravitic hooks is unimportant when\ncalculating victory points (your opponent does not get VPs for surviving orcas just\nbecause there aren’t enough gravitic hooks to notionally transport them to safety).",
